body: Built Phase 1 of the Advanced Register & Indexer based on the hardening blueprint. H1 (Aggregate Sensitivity) and H5 (Tamper-evident Ledger) are implemented in scripts/register_core.py. H3 (Mandatory fail-closed redaction) is built directly into the TamperEvidentLedgerWriter. The pure-Python filesystem collector is safe and skips sensitive paths upfront. Unit tests are green. Please audit for architectural intent.
